news.t: REX Shares Appoints Matt Holcomb as Portfolio Manager for REX IncomeMax™ Option Strategy ETF (Ticker: ULTI)
REX Shares Launches REX IncomeMax Option Strategy ETF (Ticker: ULTI)

holdings.infoBox: ULTI is an equity ETF with a total of 68 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 8.91%, CleanSpark at 5.90%, Cipher Digital at 5.83%, Riot Platforms at 5.67%, and POET Technologies at 5.38%.

overview.description: The REX IncomeMax Option Strategy ETF (ULTI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively manages a narrow portfolio of US equities combined with options trading and short-term US Treasuries. The fund seeks to generate current income from three sources: dividends, premium income, and interest income. ULTI was launched on Oct 31, 2025 and is issued by REX Shares.
